name: star-sweeper
description: Star Sweeper: A Space Adventure — a Sierra-style point-and-click adventure game built with HTML5 Canvas and JavaScript.

scripts.check: node -c js/engine.js && node -c js/game.js && node -c js/sound.js && node -c js/vr.js && node -c js/register-sw.js && node -c serviceworker.js && node tools/validate_content.js
